name: support-router-grpo
description: W921 reference recipe: SFT-warmup then GRPO/RLVR for a support-intent router. The verifiable reward is schema_validator (the router must emit JSON that validates against the intent schema) + exact-match against the gold intent. SFT teaches the format, GRPO sharpens correctness with a reward that IS the K-score verifier.

grpo.note: schema_validator reward = the K-score verifier; train-eval mismatch is a hard error.

system_prompt: You are a support-intent router. Read the user message and return ONLY a JSON object {"intent": <one of the allowed intents>, "confidence": <0..1>, "needs_human": <bool>}. Do not add prose. If the message is ambiguous, set needs_human=true.
